ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preferred_sport" TEXT /* Preferred sport of the user */,
  "total_hours_played" INTEGER /* Total hours played across all activities */,
  "favorite_teams" TEXT /* Favorite teams of the user */,
  "favorite_players" TEXT /* Favorite players of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports_types" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport type */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport (e.g., Soccer, Tennis) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the sport */,
  "equipment_needed" TEXT /* Equipment needed for the sport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition entry */,
  "outlook" TEXT /* Outlook type (e.g., Sunny, Rainy, Overcast) */,
  "temperature" TEXT /* Temperature classification (e.g., Hot, Mild, Cool) */,
  "humidity" TEXT /* Humidity classification (e.g., High, Normal, Low) */,
  "is_windy" INTEGER /* Indicates if it is windy or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user logging the activity */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather condition during the activity */,
  "hours_played" INTEGER /* Total hours played during the activity */,
  "distance_covered" REAL /* Distance covered during the activity (in miles or kilometers) */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., practice, game, tournament) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity detail entry */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity log entry */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport played */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the activity */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team or player */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the activity (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_details_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports_types ("sport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_details_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES activity_logs ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "total_logs" INTEGER /* Total number of activity logs */,
  "average_hours" REAL /* Average hours played */,
  "most_common_condition" TEXT /* Most common weather condition during activities */,
  "most_common_sport" TEXT /* Most common sport played */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance covered across all activities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sharing the activity */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity log entry being shared */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date of sharing */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or comment added to the share */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_shares_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES activity_logs ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_shares_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment entry */,
  "share_id" INTEGER /* ID of the share being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date of the comment */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_share_id FOREIGN KEY ("share_id") REFERENCES community_shares ("share_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "share_id" INTEGER /* ID of the share being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date of the rating */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Value of the rating (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_share_id FOREIGN KEY ("share_id") REFERENCES community_shares ("share_id")
)
